# MARCMAX

MARCMAX is the home of MARCO (Modular Advanced Response & Command Orchestrator), an autonomous AI orchestration platform featuring a Neural Army of 6 specialized agents, 31+ AI models, and 24/7 operational capability. Built with Next.js, React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS, MARCMAX represents the next generation of local-first AI command systems.

## The MARCO Neural Army

The MARCO Neural Army consists of 6 autonomous AI agents, each with dedicated codebases of 50,000+ lines, working in concert through encrypted IPC channels:

- **ZEPHYR**: Semantic memory and retrieval specialist with ChromaDB integration
- **CORTEX**: Task orchestration and strategic planning commander
- **NEXUS**: API integration and multi-provider model routing expert
- **SPARK**: Browser automation specialist with 200+ execution skills
- **TITAN**: Heavy compute and ML processing powerhouse
- **VANGUARD**: Security, thermal monitoring, and system protection guardian

## Site Structure (25 Pages)

### Command Center
- `/` - Home page featuring the Neural Core animation and Tactical HUD interface
- `/army` - Neural Army briefing page with tactical map and agent overview
- `/army/zephyr` - ZEPHYR agent dossier: semantic memory and vector retrieval capabilities
- `/army/cortex` - CORTEX agent dossier: task orchestration and strategic planning
- `/army/nexus` - NEXUS agent dossier: API integration and model routing
- `/army/spark` - SPARK agent dossier: browser automation and web execution
- `/army/titan` - TITAN agent dossier: heavy compute and ML processing
- `/army/vanguard` - VANGUARD agent dossier: security and thermal protection

### Intelligence Core
- `/tech` - Technology stack overview and engine room dashboard
- `/technology/models` - Model registry featuring 31+ AI models from Google AI, Groq, and OpenRouter
- `/technology/architecture` - Trinity of Power architecture: Node.js, Python, and Rust cores
- `/technology/automation` - Browser automation showcase with 200+ execution skills
- `/technology/multimodal` - Vision and voice capabilities with screen analysis
- `/technology/memory` - Semantic memory implementation with ChromaDB vector storage

### Operational Safety
- `/safety` - Safety and trust overview with secure vault theme
- `/safety/governor` - Hardware safety and thermal governor monitoring
- `/safety/privacy` - Data sovereignty and local-first storage architecture
- `/safety/self-improvement` - Autonomous code modification and validation protocols
- `/safety/security` - Security architecture with AES-256 encryption and compliance

### Support & Documentation
- `/docs` - Knowledge base with installation guides and core module documentation
- `/docs/api` - API reference for 29+ function tools and endpoints
- `/support/faq` - FAQ and troubleshooting center for common issues
- `/portal` - Commander's Portal with SaaS pre-registration

### Mission Control
- `/download` - MARCMAX SaaS installer deployment page with countdown timer
- `/changelog` - System evolution timeline and version history

## Technical Specifications

- **Framework**: Next.js 16 with App Router
- **Frontend**: React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- **Animations**: Framer Motion
- **Icons**: Lucide React
- **Deployment**: Vercel
- **Domain**: marcmax-platform.vercel.app

## Key Features

- 100% local-first data storage (zero cloud sync)
- AES-256-GCM encryption for all sensitive data
- Real-time thermal monitoring and automatic throttling
- Multi-model routing with intelligent fallback chains
- Semantic memory with 768-dimensional embeddings
- Sub-100ms API response times
- Zero telemetry collection

## Contact & Resources

- Website: https://marcmax-platform.vercel.app
- Sitemap: https://marcmax-platform.vercel.app/sitemap.xml
- Launch Date: May 15, 2026
